candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; exact match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the financial period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, useful cross-check but not preferred over balance-sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the financial period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet cash variable target.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Also appears to represent current liabilities total, but less clean formatting than the explicit total line.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best direct match to current portion of debt while explicitly excluding leases, consistent with STD baseline.
Semantically relevant supplemental debt maturity line, but values are blank and less preferred than the reported current portion line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Contains lease debt, which should be excluded in baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose a non-shortlist label because it is the clearest reported short-term debt measure and explicitly excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Tax liabilities based on the taxable income for the period

candidates.why: Mixed accrual/tax/social-security item, broader than taxes payable alone.
Deferred tax, not taxes payable/current tax liability.
Tax asset, opposite of taxes payable.

final_choice.row_label: Tax liabilities based on the taxable income for the period

Only a component of PPE, not total.
Gross component line, not total PPE.
